gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review approved the diff with no blocking findings; it noted only that the reviewed changes were uncommitted before PR evidence generation.
scope: Docs and tests only: src/document_kv_cache/templates/databricks/README.md and tests/test_template_resources.py.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_template_resources.py -q; git diff --check; poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests; poetry run pytest -q
what_changed: Documented installed-wheel extraction for packaged Databricks templates and added a template-resource guard for the handoff instructions.
why: Release consumers need repository-free Databricks bundle templates from the installed document-kv-cache wheel, and the packaged README should make the extraction path explicit.
